channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Deputy arrested for stalking after sending woman unwanted text messages after traffic stop: HCSO
item.description: Hillsborough County Sheriff’s Office (HCSO) said a deputy was arrested and charged with stalking after being accused of sending a woman unwanted text messages.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] What's in the election security documents that Trump released on Thursday?
item.description: President Trump used his prime-time address Thursday to cast doubt on the security of U.S. elections ahead of the midterms. But the documents he cited don't support his sweeping claims.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Pasco County approves Monin manufacturing plant in Zephyrhills as residents voice infrastructure concerns
item.description: Pasco commissioners approved Monin's new Zephyrhills manufacturing plant. The $100 million project will create 100-plus jobs, but some residents worry about growth and infrastructure.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Hillsborough deputy charged with stalking woman after traffic stop

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Army Corps of Engineers teams with St. Pete to help with flood issues in Riviera Bay
item.description: The Riviera Bay neighborhood in St. Pete has been experiencing flooding for years and has been pleading with the City of St. Pete for help.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] New training to improve obstetric emergency care in rural Florida counties
item.description: The goal of the Obstetrical Transitions of Care course is to make sure it is better prepared to handle maternal and newborn emergencies.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] New proton therapy center opens at Moffitt's Speros campus, bringing advanced cancer treatment to Pasco County
item.description: For Cindy Shaffer, having the treatment close to home is just as important as the technology itself.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Squeezing out the red tape: Modernizing America's orange juice standards to aid domestic farmers
item.description: A new Food and Drug Administration regulation will lower the minimum sugar content for pasteurized orange juice, a change that the Trump administration says will advance the “America First" agenda, officials announced in Lakeland on Friday.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Pasture mealybug: Grass-eating pest spreads to 16 Florida counties
item.description: Agricultural experts from the University of Florida Institute of Food and Agricultural Sciences (UF/IFAS) and the Florida Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services (FDACS) held an online workshop Friday about pasture mealybug, a tiny white insect that feasts on grasses.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Bond hearing in Sarasota double-murder case pushed back one week
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] See body cam video from two Florida deputies who were shot

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 'The facts have not changed': States push back on allegations of non-citizens voting
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the agency will be going through state databases to review any cases of noncitizens voting. But states say their elections remain secure.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] House catches fire after lightning strike in Spring Hill: HCFR
item.description: Hernando County Fire Rescue responded at about 3:15 p.m. on July 17 to the 12000 block of Elmore Drive in Spring Hill for a residential fire.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 'On his way to a full recovery': Deputy shot in the neck in Ruskin released from hospital
item.description: Hillsborough County Sheriff's Office (HCSO) said the deputy shot in the neck in an incident where two deputies were injured and the suspect was killed in Ruskin has been released from the hospital.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] First Alert Weather Day: Slow-moving tropical low to bring rain, rough conditions to Suncoast through Monday
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] How accurate are political betting apps? Florida professors weigh in
[The Florida Channel] CU 2929
item.description: CU 2929 first appeared on The Florida Channel Capitol Update is a review of state government. Topics this week focus on: CU 2929 first appeared on The Florida Channel

[WFLA News Channel 8] House GOP leaders unveil stopgap funding bill ahead of expected vote next week
item.description: House Republican leaders are preparing to bring a stopgap measure that would keep federal agencies funded through Dec. 4 to the floor next week, kicking off a high-stakes effort to avert a potential government shutdown before the end of the fiscal year on Sept. 30. Republicans unveiled the text of the short-term measure, also known [...]

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] TPA flights grounded as storms moved across Tampa Bay
item.description: Heavy thunderstorms caused a ground stop at Tampa International Airport (TPA) on Friday. According to the FAA's website, a ground stop was issued for TPA from 1:30 p.m. to 4 p.m.
